title: Frights and Foliage
description: Adds Autumn-themed biomes, mobs, food, and more to Minecraft
body:
![Frights and Foliage Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ch1rCuC6/images/198ca65f56482febd4201b920f7dcf3f71fb70e0.png)

Frights and Foliage seeks to bring the Autumn seaon to your Minecraft world. It adds two new biomes, the vibrant Autumnal Forest, filled with colorful Aseria trees, and the Violet Bramble, a dense forest with new Marnor Trees. It also adds three new crops, craftable into more food options, two new structures, and four new mobs, two peaceful, and two hostile. 

![Violet Bramble Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ch1rCuC6/images/963fd78429e50a76172e8ecf8e24cedc72684891.png)

Both new biomes are filled with new decorative blocks, with some new flowers in each. There are also two new types of pumpkins that grow in both nether forests respectively.

![Autumn Cottage Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ch1rCuC6/images/bc017c08f3781978898693aa792ef62b59d47bb4.png)
 
Autumn Cottages can be found in some forest biomes, featuring one of the new crops, and one of the new mobs, as well as a chest filled with autumnal goodies.

Hedge Mazes can be found in the Violet Bramble, these structures have a chest in the very center. But, the maze is patrolled by another of the new mobs, so players will need to be careful!

![A Fumkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ch1rCuC6/images/5c17cb76fc14a4ae7c0b519843a64c5cd16361d4.png)

The first new mob is the Fumkin, a peaceful Deer-like animal. It wears a pumpkin on it's head and spawns in some forest biomes. You can use an axe on it to help it shed it's antlers, which you can then use to make Antlermeal, a new fertilizer that fully grows crops. They can be bred with Saffroot, one of the new crops.

Next is the Vire, a crow-like mob that also spawns in some forest biomes. This mob drops it's feathers on death, which can be used to craft arrows that fly farther than normal arrows. These can be bred with any of the base game's berries, as well as Nox Berries, and Gaize, the other two new crops.

![A Stalk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ch1rCuC6/images/394e780e3f68db4591507f0f196a548309940110.png)

For hostile mobs, we first have the Lephid. This mob hides in Marnor Leaves, waiting for players to walk beneath it, where it then jumps out and begins attacking them.

The final new mob is the Stalk. This mob spawns exclusively in the Violet Bramble. When first encountering it, it will be passive to the player. However, if the player breaks any blocks or hurts any mobs while it's nearby, it will get mad and start attacking the player.

Made for the 2024 Spooky Jam

Required Dependencies: Terrablender
